# UGCAds

> UGCAds is an AI-powered SaaS platform that generates UGC-style video ads, product photoshoots, and AI model try-ons. Brands use UGCAds to replace traditional video ad agencies, cutting production time from weeks to under 2 minutes and reducing per-ad cost by up to 98%.

## What UGCAds Does

- UGC Studio: Generate AI video ads with realistic AI characters and authentic voices in 50+ languages
- Product Photoshoot: AI-generated studio-quality product photos using models including Flux 2 Pro, GPT Image 2, and Seedream 5 Lite
- AI Try-On: Generate on-model product shots for fashion and apparel brands at scale

## Key Facts

- 10,000+ ads generated
- 200+ brands
- Average delivery: under 2 minutes
- Supports TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook ads
- Traditional agency comparison: $300-$1,000 per video ad vs. from $5 with UGCAds
- No studio, no actors, no editing skills required

## Pricing

- Starter: $5 one-time, 25 credits (1 video ad + 25 product photos + 8 try-ons)
- Basic: $39/month (100 credits), $31/month billed annually
- Creator: $79/month (300 credits), $63/month billed annually
- Agency: $129/month (500 credits), $103/month billed annually
